title: diospyros lycioides subsp. lycioides
intro: Diospyros lycioides subsp. lycioides, commonly known as the red-berried ebony or bush ebony, is a plant species belonging to the family Ebenaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids in its leaves, roots, and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Diospyros lycioides subsp. lycioides include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
